name: ASUS TUF GAMING B850M-E WIFI Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 1x PCIe 5.0 x16 - 1x PCIe 4.0 x1 - Support DDR5-8000+(OC) - 3x M.2 Slots - USB 10Gbps Type-C+A - HDMI 2.1 - 2x DisplayPort 1.4 - Realtek 2.5Gb LAN - 802.11ax 2x2 Wi-Fi 6E - Bluetooth 5.3

description: Micro-ATX AM5 gaming motherboard with DDR5-8000+ and Wi-Fi 6E for compact gaming rigs.
